title: R27 — Workshops + Anonymous Connect Voice restored
notes: RESTORED: Workshops tab back in bottom nav (still placeholder data, real impl coming).
RESTORED: Anonymous Connect orb (purple/pink circle between Experts and Messages).

NEW: Anonymous Connect Voice now WORKS — uses same Agora pipeline as expert calls. Tap '📞 Connect Voice' on a match → creates real call_invites row → fires push to matched user → both join Agora channel. Anonymous calls are free (rate=0).
Includes all R23+R24+R25+R26 features from previous bundle (verification, subscriptions, Forgot Password, in-app modals).
